name: io.github.phasespace-labs/palinode
title: Palinode
description: Git-versioned markdown memory across AI agents — search, save, compact, lint, audit. Local-first, MCP-native, with optional bearer-token auth for network-exposed deployments.

packageArguments.name: --from
packageArguments.description: Select the palinode distribution from PyPI
Console script for the stdio MCP server

environmentVariables.name: PALINODE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Path to the markdown-memory directory (e.g. ~/.palinode). Created if missing.

environmentVariables.name: PALINODE_API_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Host where the back-end palinode-api process is reachable

environmentVariables.name: PALINODE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token enforced on every palinode-api request other than /health. Required when PALINODE_API_BIND_INTENT=public. Generate with: python -c 'import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))'.

environmentVariables.name: PALINODE_API_TOKEN_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to a file containing the bearer token (alternative to PALINODE_API_TOKEN; for docker-secrets style deployments)

packageArguments.name: --from
packageArguments.description: Select the palinode distribution from PyPI
Console script for the long-running streamable-HTTP MCP server

environmentVariables.name: PALINODE_MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Bind host for the MCP HTTP server. Defaults to loopback; set to 0.0.0.0 only with intentional network exposure (paired with PALINODE_API_BIND_INTENT=public on the back-end).

environmentVariables.name: PALINODE_MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port for the MCP HTTP server

environmentVariables.name: PALINODE_API_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Host where the back-end palinode-api is reachable

environmentVariables.name: PALINODE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token enforced by palinode-api. Required when binding non-loopback. Generate with: python -c 'import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))'.

environmentVariables.name: PALINODE_API_TOKEN_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to a file containing the bearer token (alternative to PALINODE_API_TOKEN)
